ddls:
CREATE TABLE "recipes" (
  "recipe_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recipe */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the recipe */,
  "id" INTEGER /* ID of the recipe (for external references) */,
  "minutes" INTEGER /* Cooking time in minutes */,
  "contributor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contributor who submitted the recipe */,
  "submitted" TEXT /* Date the recipe was submitted */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags associated with the recipe (e.g., course, cooking time) */,
  "nutrition" TEXT /* Nutritional information (e.g., calories, protein, fat) */,
  "n_steps" INTEGER /* Number of steps in the recipe */,
  "steps" TEXT /* Step-by-step cooking instructions */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the recipe */,
  "ingredients" TEXT /* Ingredients required for the recipe */,
  "n_ingredients" INTEGER /* Number of ingredients required */,
  "difficulty" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the recipe (e.g., easy, medium, hard) */,
  "cuisine" TEXT /* Cuisine type of the recipe (e.g., Italian, Mexican) */,
  "course" TEXT /* Course type (e.g., appetizer, main course, dessert) */,
  "servings" INTEGER /* Number of servings the recipe yields */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL to a video tutorial for the recipe */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the final dish */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recipe_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recipes_contributor_id FOREIGN KEY ("contributor_id") REFERENCES contributors ("contributor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contributors" (
  "contributor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contributor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the contributor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the contributor */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL of the contributor's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* A brief biography of the contributor */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the contributor's website or blog */,
  "social_media" TEXT /* URL to the contributor's social media profiles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contributor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the tag (e.g., cooking time, course, cuisine) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ingredients" (
  "ingredient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ingredient */,
  "ingredient_name" TEXT /* Name of the ingredient */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ingredient */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the ingredient (e.g., grams, cups, tablespoons) */,
  "allergens" TEXT /* Any allergens associated with the ingredient (e.g., nuts, dairy) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ingredient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recipe_tags" (
  "recipe_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recipe */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recipe_id", "tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recipe_ingredients" (
  "recipe_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recipe */,
  "ingredient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ingredient */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Quantity of the ingredient required */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the ingredient (e.g., grams, cups, tablespoons) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recipe_id", "ingredient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nutritional_info" (
  "nutrition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each nutritional information entry */,
  "recipe_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recipe */,
  "calories" REAL /* Calories per serving */,
  "protein" REAL /* Protein per serving (in grams) */,
  "fat" REAL /* Fat per serving (in grams) */,
  "carbohydrates" REAL /* Carbohydrates per serving (in grams) */,
  "fiber" REAL /* Fiber per serving (in grams) */,
  "sugar" REAL /* Sugar per serving (in grams) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nutrition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nutritional_info_recipe_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipe_id") REFERENCES recipes ("recipe_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., contributor, administrator, user) */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* A brief biography of the user */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the user's website or blog */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "recipe_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recipe being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the recipe */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the recipe was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the recipe */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the recipe */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_recipe_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipe_id") REFERENCES recipes ("recipe_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "recipe_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recipe being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user reviewing the recipe */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was written */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "helpful_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the review has been marked as helpful */,
  "unhelpful_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the review has been marked as unhelpful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_recipe_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipe_id") REFERENCES recipes ("recipe_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
